" 2>&1)

from sqlalchemy import create_engine, text
import os
engine = create_engine\(os.environ.get\('DATABASE_URL', 'postgresql://owleague:owleague@db:5432/owleague'\)\)
with engine.connect\(\) as conn:
    conn.execute\(text\(\\"DELETE FROM player_profiles WHERE user_id IN \(SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='test@test.com'\)\\"\)\)
    conn.execute\(text\(\\"DELETE FROM users WHERE email='test@test.com'\\"\)\)
    conn.commit\(\)
    print\('Test user cleaned up'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec ow-league-backend-1 python -c "
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, text
import os
engine = create_engine\(os.environ.get\('DATABASE_URL', 'postgresql://owleague:owleague@db:5432/owleague'\)\)
with engine.connect\(\) as conn:
    result = conn.execute\(text\(\\"SELECT id, real_name, nickname, role FROM users WHERE email='qkdl7717@gmail.com'\\"\)\)
    row = result.fetchone\(\)
    if row:
        print\(f'Found: {row[1]} \({row[2]}\), role={row[3]}'\)
        conn.execute\(text\(\\"UPDATE users SET role='admin' WHERE email='qkdl7717@gmail.com'\\"\)\)
        conn.commit\(\)
        print\('-> admin으로 설정 완료'\)
    else:
        print\('User not found'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec ow-league-backend-1 python -c "
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, text
import os
engine = create_engine\(os.environ.get\('DATABASE_URL', 'postgresql://owleague:owleague@db:5432/owleague'\)\)
with engine.connect\(\) as conn:
    result = conn.execute\(text\('SELECT id, name, status FROM seasons'\)\)
    rows = result.fetchall\(\)
    if rows:
        for r in rows: print\(f'{r[0]} | {r[1]} | {r[2]}'\)
    else:
        print\('No seasons found'\)
" 2>&1)
